title: Caramelized Jamaican Beetroot Stir-fry
description: An energizing earthy dish featuring crispy cooked beetroot, deglazed with a touch of sweetness to complement the natural earthiness of the root vegetable.

ingredients.name: Almond Butter
ingredients.amount: 2 tsp (substitute with coconut oil for a non-paleo option)

instructions: Wash and peel the beetroot, then slice them into thin rounds or julienne strips.

In a large skillet, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add beetroot slices, garlic, a pinch of salt, black pepper, and paprika. Stir-fry until the beetroot is lightly charred and tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice and almond butter (or coconut oil). Cook for an additional minute to reduce slightly and intensify flavors.
Serve immediately as a snack or side dish.
